wrapped.title: Telegram Wrapped
wrapped.subtitle: Your Telegram activity — beautifully visualized
wrapped.emptyDesc: Choose a time period and hit Generate to see your personal Telegram Wrapped

personality.nightOwlDesc: You come alive after midnight. Your best conversations happen when the world is asleep.
personality.earlyBirdDesc: First messages sent before most people are even awake. You start your day connected.
personality.chatterboxDesc: You're never short of words. Your contacts probably know when you're online!
personality.visualDesc: A picture is worth a thousand words — and you live by that motto.
personality.newsDesc: You follow more channels than most. You're always the first to know.
personality.mindfulDesc: Quality over quantity. You message with intention and purpose.

archiver.title: Smart Archiver
archiver.subtitle: Clean up your chat list automatically
archiver.info: This tool only archives chats — it never deletes messages or leaves groups. You can unarchive anytime from Telegram.
archiver.skipHint: Chats with these words in their title will never be suggested
archiver.confirmMsg: Archive {n} chats? They'll move to Telegram's archived folder. You can restore them anytime.
archiver.emptyDesc: Set your rules and click Scan to find inactive chats
archiver.historyEmptyDesc: Chats you archive will appear here

saves.title: Saved Messages
saves.subtitle: Your Telegram notebook — organized
saves.noResultsDesc: Try a different search or filter
saves.emptyDesc: Click the button above to load all your Telegram saved messages
saves.notePlaceholder: Add a note to remember why you saved this...

gramkit.subtitle: Your Telegram power toolkit — all tools, zero backend

guard.title: Not Connected
guard.desc: Please connect your Telegram account first

guide.show: How to get your API credentials
guide.step1Desc: Go to my.telegram.org and log in with your phone number
guide.step2Desc: Click on 'API development tools' and fill in the form
guide.step3Desc: Copy the API ID and API Hash into the fields above

otp.title: Verify Your Identity
otp.subtitle: We sent a code to
otp.hint: Check your Telegram app for the verification code

wrapped.desc: Your personal Telegram stats — messages, contacts, habits and more

archiver.name: Smart Archiver
archiver.desc: Auto-find and archive inactive chats with custom rules

saves.name: Saved Messages
saves.desc: Search, tag, and organize your Telegram saved messages

tools.heading: Your Tools
tools.sub: Select a tool to get started

jobs.name: Job Scanner
jobs.desc: Find job posts across all your channels by keyword

analytics.name: Channel Analytics
analytics.desc: Activity charts, peak hours, and top words per channel

monitor.name: Keyword Monitor
monitor.desc: Get alerts when new matching posts appear in real time

cleaner.name: Message Cleaner
cleaner.desc: Find and delete your own messages from any group

members.name: Member Exporter
members.desc: Export group members to CSV with one click

media.name: Media Downloader
media.desc: Browse and download all media files from a channel

toast.codeSent: Verification code sent to your Telegram

jobs.emptyDesc: Try adjusting your keywords or date range and scan again

analytics.emptyDesc: Pick a channel from the list above to see its analytics

monitor.noAlertsDesc: Start monitoring and alerts will appear here when keywords are found
monitor.noKeywords: Please add at least one keyword to monitor

cleaner.safety: Only YOUR messages will be deleted. Other members' messages are never touched.
cleaner.noMsgs: No messages found in this channel
cleaner.emptyDesc: Select a group to preview and delete your messages
cleaner.confirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {count} messages? This cannot be undone.

members.emptyDesc: Select a group to export its member list

media.emptyDesc: Select a channel to browse its media files
media.noMedia: No media found in this channel

screenMirrorSub: Share your screen live to any device on the same Wi-Fi — no app, no account
startTyping: Start typing — connected devices see changes in real time...
bothDevicesSameWifi: Both devices must be on the same Wi-Fi. Open the link or scan QR on your phone.
sendTextLinks: Send text or links — appear on all connected devices instantly
runNuxtWithHttps: Run Nuxt with nuxt dev --https or use a tunnel like ngrok, then open that HTTPS URL on both devices.
captureDesc: Click below — browser will ask which window or tab to share.
sendLinkToViewer: Send this link to the viewer
sendLinkDesc: Open it on your phone or any device on the same Wi-Fi — the connection is automatic.
waitingForHostDesc: When the host starts sharing, the stream appears here automatically. Make sure both devices use the same URL.
howStep1: Host opens this page, clicks Start, shares the link
howStep2: Viewer opens the link on their device (same Wi-Fi)
howStep3: Both connect to the local Nuxt WebSocket signaling server
howStep4: WebRTC peer-to-peer video — never leaves your network
requiresHttps: Requires HTTPS (run nuxt dev --https). Video is peer-to-peer.
entryDesc: A collection of practical tools and developer resources
toolboxDesc: Collection of handy utilities — screen mirror, notepad, clipboard sync and more
createRoomDesc: Create a new room and invite others with the room code.
noScreenSharingDesc: Share your screen or wait for a room member to start sharing.
mobileShareHint: On mobile, your camera will be used as the shared feed.

pwa.installSub: Add to your home screen for a better experience
